title: Frieren GUI
body:
### _Hey, it's oninaeth again !_
### 
Here is a "Frieren : Beyond Journey's End" themed GUI. I made it for my boyfriend at first, and then I decided to publish it.

I hope you'll enjoy playing with it !

**Fabric and ModMenu are supported.**

You can join my discord server if you have any issue or suggestion to make.

_Thank you, and have a nice day !_
